bead.title: bench: align analytics path parser with backfilled 3-part cell layout
bead.description:
PR 2 (backfill, commit 800e0ae2) reorganized cell paths from cells/<suite>/<task>/<profile-id>/<rep-NNN>/report.json (4 parts under cells/) to cells/<suite>/<task>/<cell-id>/report.json (3 parts under cells/). PR 3 (analytics, commit 2798a426) updated field access to use embedded cell.profile.* but did not update the path-parsing at scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py:557:

  rel = report_path.relative_to(cells_root)
  suite, task, lane_id, rep_dir = rel.parts[:4]

This will raise ValueError on backfilled cells (only 3 parts under cells_root). Confirmed: 'find benchmark-results/fiz-tools-v1/cells/terminal-bench-2-1 -name report.json | head -1' returns paths like '.../mcmc-sampling-stan/20260510T011847Z-56be/report.json' — only 3 parts.

Also still stale: the column names 'internal_lane_id' and 'lane_label' are emitted by the python pipeline (lines 609, 613, 806, 871, 911) and read by website/assets/js/benchmark-workbench.js DuckDB queries. With cell-as-evidence (ADR-016) these should be renamed to 'profile_id' or similar — there's no 'lane' concept anymore.

In-scope files:
- scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py (path parsing + column naming around lines 140, 557, 609, 613, 806, 871, 911)
- website/assets/js/benchmark-workbench.js (DuckDB SELECT statements that reference internal_lane_id / lane_label)
- website/static/js/benchmark-workbench.js (likely the built artifact)
- website/static/data/cells.schema.json (declared schema)
- Probably website/benchmark_workbench_smoke_test.go (test of the workbench)
- Regenerate static data: website/static/data/cells.json, task-combinations.json after pipeline change

Out-of-scope:
- Re-running benchmarks (data regeneration only)

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-016-cells-are-self-describing-evidence.md
bead.acceptance:
1. 'python scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py' runs to completion on the current backfilled benchmark-results/ tree without errors.
2. The output cells.json schema does not contain 'internal_lane_id' or 'lane_label' columns (renamed to profile_id / public profile label).
3. 'rg "internal_lane_id|lane_label" website/assets/js/ website/static/js/' returns zero hits.
4. 'go test ./website/...' passes.
5. The benchmark explorer page loads in a browser smoke-test against regenerated data.
